pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description (Steps 4 and 7).
The prompt asks the agent to move near the target, but the exact 0.05m numeric threshold is absent from all scripts including the stubbed verifier.
Explicitly defined in the task description (Step 8) and setup_task.sh cleanup steps.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the obstacleAvoidanceAndIk.ttt scene, which is an authentic, non-synthetic built-in example provided by the official CoppeliaSim distribution. The requested target positions ([0.3, 0.3, 0.4] and [-0.3, 0.2, 0.3]) and output screenshot path exactly match the task prompt instructions. The exact numeric tolerance of 0.05m could not be verified as it does not appear in the prompt or the stubbed verifier logic.
